name: Unity
domain: Unification of forces, identity elements, wholeness, convergence of descriptions
core_insight: Apparently separate phenomena are often the same phenomenon seen from different angles. Maxwell unified electricity and magnetism; electroweak theory merged electromagnetic and weak forces. The identity element in any group represents the 'doing nothing' that defines the system's wholeness. E = mc² unifies mass and energy as a single conserved quantity.

key_equations.name: Einstein's Mass-Energy
key_equations.why: Mass and energy are the same conserved quantity — the deepest unification in classical physics

key_equations.name: Maxwell's Unification
key_equations.why: Four equations unify electricity and magnetism — two forces become one field

key_equations.name: Identity Element
key_equations.why: Every group has a unity: the operation that leaves all elements unchanged — the definition of wholeness in algebra

seed_prompt: ◎ What two descriptions are secretly one? Find the unifying frame. The identity element is always present.
